name: scl-marketplace
description: SCL (System Cognitive Layer) — graph-based context compression for Claude Code skills

plugins.name: scl
plugins.description: Compress any domain knowledge skill into a typed graph. 80-90% token savings per query. Two modes: AUTHOR (index a SKILL.md into a .scg.yaml) and CONSUMER (auto-load pruned context instead of full SKILL.md).
